entities.entity_name: a dataset of information seeking questions and answers anchored in research papers
entities.description: a dataset of information seeking questions and answers anchored in research papers is the title of the work described in the text
arxiv preprint arxiv 2105 03011 is the specific publication venue and identifier for the work
2021 is the year the preprint was published
research papers are the source material from which the information seeking questions and answers are anchored
information seeking questions are the specific type of queries included in the dataset
answers are the responses paired with the questions in the dataset
